text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! 🎉 Your application has been approved and you've been granted the Moderator role. Please review the mod guidelines pinned in #mod-hub and introduce yourself when you're ready. Glad to have you!
Welcome, guide_sam! 🎉 You've been approved as an Event Helper. Check out #events-team for upcoming schedules and coordination. We're excited to have you on board!

Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! 🎉 Your application has been approved and you're now a Member. Feel free to explore, introduce yourself in #introductions, and don't hesitate to ask if you need anything. Happy to have you here!

Welcome, mentor_lina! 🎉 Your application has been approved and you've been granted the Mentor role. Head over to #mentors-lounge to connect with the team and get oriented. We're thrilled to have your expertise in the community!
